---
name: Bug report
description: Report a problem in the curriculum, templates, labs, or documentation
title: "[bug] "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## What is wrong?

Describe the issue clearly.

## Where is it?

File or folder:

```text
path/to/file.md
```

## Expected behavior

What should the content say or do?

## Actual behavior

What does it currently say or do?

## Suggested fix

If you already have a fix in mind, describe it here.

## Safety check

Does this issue include sensitive data, real credentials, or exploit details for a real system?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes  -  do not post those details publicly
